commissioning.sourceNote: Guided 1.9-2.4 GW COD by end-FY25 but only 1.48 GW commissioned; ~600 MW evacuation-dependent slipped, ~466 MW COD'd just after year-end.
Full-COD target of 30-Sep-2025 slipped: only ~680 MW live at the Nov-2025 call, full 1,000 MW COD 24-Dec-2025; ~120 MW still curtailed on grid-balancing equipment.

commissioning.project: Avaada Inclean 300 MW solar (Gujarat, DVC PPA)
commissioning.sourceNote: SCoD slipped ~3.5 months (14-Sep-25 -> 31-Dec-25) per ICRA; 25-yr DVC PPA at Rs2.70/kWh, 96% promoter equity infused.
Full 300 MW COD 16-Oct-2025 after phased commissioning; slipped from an earlier ~31-Aug-2025 target. PSPCL 25-yr PUA.
Delivered 5.05 GW greenfield in FY26 (3.41 solar + 0.68 Khavda wind + 0.96 hybrid); op base 14.2->19.3 GW. Met the 5 GW commitment.
~4.8 GW ran as merchant/infirm for want of evacuation; 2-3 tranches guided for H1FY26 slipped; Q3FY26 re-guided up to 3 GW from Q4FY26, 14 GW Khavda evacuation by Mar-2027.
Commissioned ~2.4 GW (top end of the 1.8-2.4 GW guide raised at Q3 FY26); highest annual in company history, op base ~12.6 GW.
450 MW FY26 generation guidance held from Q1 FY26 and delivered; operational fleet reached 2,982 MW at 31-Mar-26 - a rare Indian-IPP target that did NOT slip.
NLCIL's largest single-site solar, built in 3 phases; full 300 MW COD 24-Jan-2026 on schedule, lifting group RE to ~1,766 MW.

commissioning.project: SJVN FDRE - India's first (259 MWp solar + BESS)
commissioning.sourceNote: 259 MWp solar entered COD Mar-2026; first developer under SJVN's FDRE tender to begin commissioning, supplies Haryana.
108 MW of 200 MW COD Feb-2026, balance ~92 MW by Apr-2026 per revised SECI SCoD; ICRA upgraded on de-risking.
5 GW FY26 target held from IPO but delivered ~4.2 GW (~15% miss); the ~0.8 GW tail incl. Khavda-II final phases slipped into Q1 FY27.
GWh. Merchant BESS reshaped (2.5->1->2 GWh across Q1-Q3); ~2.3 GWh finally commissioned in phases Feb-May 2026, spilling into Q1 FY27 for peak-tariff arbitrage.
270 MW COD 11 Mar 2026; final 105 MW COD 28 May 2026 - last phases landed just past FY26, part of the ~0.8 GW shortfall.
183 MWp solar + ~122 MW wind commissioned 30-148 days AHEAD of SCOD - early delivery.
First 300 MW still 'under commissioning' at the May-2026 results, slipping past its Q4FY26 target; park acquired under-construction Apr-2024.
Guided COD ~June 2026, pushed from the earlier 'within FY2025-26' schedule; unconfirmed as of mid-2026.
Delayed early on land due-diligence ('big hole in the land'), trimmed 18->17.6 MW; commissioning holds Q1FY27, full output drifts to Q2FY27.
First repowering under TN Life-Extension Policy; enabling policy slipped repeatedly through FY26, benefits now only in H2FY27.
Ramp slipped ~2-3Q: May-25 guide of ~3.5 GW by CY2025 became 2.5 GW by Mar-26, and 3 GW only reached Jul-2026.
450 MW AC / 830 MWp DC for own discom at Rs3.65/unit; 'SCOD by Sept-2026' held stable across the Feb-2025 and Feb-2026 decks - an on-track counterpoint.
Original SCOD Dec-2025 revised to Q2FY27 on adverse weather; Q3FY26 already split into ~300 MW by end-FY26 + 300 MW early FY27; further slippage flagged.
Guided COD ~Dec 2026, consistent with the 'during FY2026-27' target; gated on the ISTS sub-station for evacuation.
'SCOD by Sept-2025' guided in Feb-2025; only 218 MW live by Dec-2025 (unsuitable govt lease land), SCOD extensions applied; remainder guided 6-9 months from May-2026 = H2 FY27.
Nearest-term named block, listed at '2026'; FY25 results describe a 300 MW India solar acquisition completing by end-1H2026. Year unchanged across decks.
620 MWac GUVNL PPAs (Oct-2024); full COD guided Oct-2026, commissioned in phased ~24 MW tranches, ~182 MWp energised by mid-2026.
GWh. FY27 BESS guidance RAISED from >7 GWh to >10 GWh; 3.37 GWh already live (world's largest single-location outside China), soaking up curtailed Khavda output.
8 GW FY27 reaffirmed since IPO but ~1.9x the 4.2 GW just delivered; NGEL missed FY25 and FY26 and is heavily Q4-backloaded.
Guided 4.5-5.0 GW for FY27 - a deliberate self-cap vs 7-8 GW capability, explicitly contingent on grid evacuation; below the ~7.5 GW/yr the 50GW-by-2030 goal implies.
3-4 GW FY26 organic guide softened to '>15 GW total by Mar-26'; FY26 closed with only ~1.2 GW organic, the ~2 GW miss rolled into FY27 (now guided 3 GW).
Forward guide to complete 1.6-2.4 GW by FY27; same cadence as delivered FY26. Newly issued, no prior period to slip from.

commissioning.project: Pugal FDRE - 1,560 MWp solar + 2,500 MWh BESS (SJVN)
commissioning.sourceNote: India's largest BESS-FDRE; PM Modi foundation stone Sep-2025, US$950m financial closure; commissioning guided across FY27-FY28.
Guides ~1,555 MW in FY27; at-risk given chronic execution slippage (only ~4.2 GW operational at Q3FY26) and flagged Khavda transmission delays.

commissioning.project: FY27 program (1.5 GW gen + ~10 GWh BESS)
commissioning.sourceNote: 1.5 GW contracted generation + ~10 GWh BESS, reiterated from Q3 FY26; timed to CTU substation charging with a ~1-quarter buffer. Full 3.3 GW book guided by FY28.
1.2-1.4 GW DC guided for FY27 (~50/50 wind/solar); trimmed from 1.2-1.5 GW at Q3 but year held. From a ~4.3 GWp contracted pipeline.
LOAs issued, 25-yr PPAs signed, 1 GW wind turbines contracted (Envision, Jun-2025); guided fully operational by FY27.
GWh. LOI ~Q2FY26; guided fully operational by FY27, revenue from FY28.
'Expected Commissioning' slipped a full year FY26->FY27 across the Nov-25 to Feb-26 decks; 400 MW PPA at Rs3.60/kWh.
Suzlon EPC; 'SCOD by Jan-2026' guided in Feb-2025, downgraded to 'applied for SCOD extension' (evacuation not ready); COD now expected before Mar-2027. ~1-year slip.
Named FY27 component now under construction; management cautioned Khavda-zone curtailment risk from transmission-connectivity delays.
GWh. Hard disclosed SCOD Jan-2027 (Q4FY27); tariff Rs4.31/kWh, BESPA signed.
304-day land-allotment delay + RoW/protests; GERC granted partial SCOD relief pushing it from ~Q2FY26 into FY27.
Softened from flat 'FY27' full-COD to 'phase-wise from FY27', i.e. back-end tranches spill past FY27; largest block, 460 MW firm PPA.
~6-7 month push-out: the GSECL government substation (GSS)/evacuation infra ran late; GUVNL agreed to extend PPA start, hybrid balance slips into FY28.
Largest greenfield hybrid, guided '2027-2028' (COD ~24 mo from PPA); sits inside the UC block whose horizon has slipped, ICRA warns pipeline scale heightens delay risk.
LOI Q1FY26, PPA by Q2FY26; COD guided ~Nov-2027. Early-stage.
3 GW RE+storage under construction, guided COD over 'next 12-15 months' (~H2 CY2027); Feb-26 '5 GW by FY27' now looks to slip into FY28.

commissioning.project: India greenfield solar under construction (~1.93 GW)
commissioning.sourceNote: Completion tail pushed from <=2027 out to 2030: Dec-24 op-data had UC solar done by 2027; Dec-25 op-data shows 918 MW @2028 and 300 MW @2030. ICRA flags delay risk.
1,200 MW contracted / 1,600 MW installed; decks give no per-project COD, FY28 modelled off the 30 GW-by-2030 path.
One of three NIRL projects started FY26 (nascent); no explicit COD guided, FY28 modelled; Acuité warns of possible further slippage.
COD guidance pushed a full year FY27->FY28 in the May-26 deck; 200 MW firm PPA at Rs4.71/kWh.
GWh. Storage projects guided 'completed within 18 months' from May-2026 (~H2 FY28); classed nascent by Acuité.
COD is '24 months post-PPA' but the 88 MW RTC PPA stayed UNSIGNED 15+ months after LoA, so the clock hasn't started - effectively stalled.

notes: Roster operational/UC/pipeline capacities are FY26 company disclosures & investor presentations; lower-confidence rows are user-maintained estimates.
FY30 targets and tech-mix splits are company disclosures / investor presentations; PPA-signed GW is derived from the PPA tracker.
The PPA tracker lists real SECI / NTPC / SJVN auction signings (awarded MW, ₹/kWh) sourced from SECI results & trade press.
BESS is tracked in GWh and excluded from the GW-share portfolio donut.

Commissioning guidance is captured per capacity tranche from company concalls / investor disclosures, keeping each revision so slippage (a pushed-out COD) is tracked; lower-confidence rows are Munshot estimates.
